pi_items.verified_value: ["Mozilla Foundation", "Wikimedia Foundation Org", "Electronic Frontier Foundation Inc"]
pi_items.source: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer official organization names: EIN 20-0097189 (Mozilla), 20-0049703 (Wikimedia), 04-3091431 (EFF). Metadata uses internal identifiers; ProPublica uses full legal names.
Web search and ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer confirmed Mozilla Foundation EIN is 20-0097189. Note: Task description states 'EIN ending in 3644' which is INCORRECT (ends in 7189).
Web search and ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer confirmed Wikimedia Foundation EIN is 20-0049703. Task description correctly states 'EIN ending in 9703'.
Web search and ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer confirmed EFF EIN is 04-3091431. Note: Task description states 'EIN ending in 5670' which is INCORRECT (ends in 1431).

privileged_info_summary: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer is accessible at projects.propublica.org/nonprofits/. Three target organizations are: (1) Mozilla Foundation (EIN 20-0097189, ~$26.4M revenue in 2023); (2) Wikimedia Foundation Org (EIN 20-0049703, $185.4M revenue in 2023-2024); (3) Electronic Frontier Foundation Inc (EIN 04-3091431, $23.9M revenue in 2024). All organizations exceed the $1M revenue threshold. Important note: Task description contains factual errors - Mozilla Foundation EIN does not end in 3644 (correct ending: 7189) and EFF EIN does not end in 5670 (correct ending: 1431). Only Wikimedia Foundation EIN ending (9703) is correctly stated in task description.
